metadata.title: Response — Marriage/Domestic Partnership
metadata.author: Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
metadata.copyright: © 2024–2026 Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann. All Rights Reserved.
metadata.notes: Mirror structure of FL-100 from respondent perspective. Must be filed within 30 days of service.

fields.guidance_en: Enter the Respondent's full legal name or attorney's name with State Bar number. This is the person filing the response.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese el nombre legal completo del Demandado o el nombre del abogado con número del Colegio de Abogados.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入被告的完整法定姓名或律师姓名及州律师协会编号。此为提交答辩书的一方。
common_errors: Name mismatch with FL-100/FL-110
Omitting State Bar number

fields.guidance_en: Enter a valid mailing address for the responding party. Confidential address requests use GC-120.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese una dirección postal válida para la parte que responde. Las solicitudes de dirección confidencial usan GC-120.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入答辩方的有效邮寄地址。保密地址请求使用GC-120。
common_errors: Using an address where party no longer resides
Not filing GC-120 when address confidentiality needed

fields.guidance_en: Phone and email are optional but recommended. Email is required for electronic service consent.
fields.guidance_es: El teléfono y correo electrónico son opcionales pero recomendados. Se requiere correo electrónico para consentir servicio electrónico.
fields.guidance_zh: 电话和电子邮件为可选但建议填写。同意电子送达需提供电子邮件。
common_errors: Providing inactive contact information

fields.guidance_en: Must match the court where the Petition (FL-100) was filed. The response MUST be filed in the same court and county as the original petition.
fields.guidance_es: Debe coincidir con el tribunal donde se presentó la Petición (FL-100). La respuesta DEBE presentarse en el mismo tribunal y condado que la petición original.
fields.guidance_zh: 必须与提交请愿书（FL-100）的法院一致。答辩书必须在与原请愿书相同的法院和县提交。
common_errors: Filing in wrong court
Wrong branch courthouse
Address mismatch with FL-100

fields.guidance_en: Must exactly match the Petitioner and Respondent names on the FL-100 and FL-110. Do NOT reverse the party designations — the original Petitioner remains Petitioner.
fields.guidance_es: Debe coincidir exactamente con los nombres del Peticionario y Demandado en el FL-100 y FL-110. NO invierta las designaciones — el Peticionario original sigue siendo Peticionario.
fields.guidance_zh: 必须与FL-100和FL-110上的请愿人和被告姓名完全一致。不要颠倒当事人称谓——原请愿人仍为请愿人。
common_errors: Reversing Petitioner/Respondent roles
Name spelling inconsistency across forms

fields.guidance_en: Enter the case number assigned when the FL-100 was filed. This number appears on the summons (FL-110) you were served.
fields.guidance_es: Ingrese el número de caso asignado cuando se presentó el FL-100. Este número aparece en la citación (FL-110) que recibió.
fields.guidance_zh: 输入FL-100立案时分配的案件编号。此编号显示在您收到的传票（FL-110）上。
common_errors: Wrong case number
Using case number from different proceeding

fields.guidance_en: The Respondent may AGREE with the Petitioner's request or REQUEST A DIFFERENT TYPE of proceeding. For example, if the Petitioner requested dissolution, the Respondent can request legal separation instead. The court will consider both requests.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado puede ESTAR DE ACUERDO con la solicitud del Peticionario o SOLICITAR UN TIPO DIFERENTE de procedimiento. Por ejemplo, si el Peticionario solicitó disolución, el Demandado puede solicitar separación legal.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告可以同意请愿人的请求，也可以请求不同类型的程序。例如，如果请愿人请求解除婚姻，被告可以请求合法分居。法院将考虑双方请求。
common_errors: Not understanding respondent can request different relief
Leaving blank assumes agreement with petition

options: Neither satisfies residency — legal separation only
fields.guidance_en: Respondent confirms or disputes whether residency requirements are met. If Respondent believes Petitioner filed in wrong county, this is where to flag it.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado confirma o disputa si se cumplen los requisitos de residencia.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告确认或质疑是否满足居住要求。如被告认为请愿人在错误的县提交，应在此标注。
common_errors: Not challenging residency when Petitioner doesn't meet requirements
Not understanding this is a venue challenge opportunity

fields.guidance_en: Respondent enters their understanding of the dates. If dates DIFFER from the Petition, this creates a disputed issue that must be resolved. The date of separation is often contested — it affects community property cutoff and support duration.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado ingresa su comprensión de las fechas. Si las fechas DIFIEREN de la Petición, esto crea un tema disputado que debe resolverse.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告输入其理解的日期。如果日期与请愿书不同，则产生需要解决的争议事项。分居日期经常有争议——它影响共同财产截止日期和赡养费期限。
common_errors: Not disputing incorrect date of separation
Not understanding impact of separation date on property division
Agreeing to inaccurate dates without review

options: A completed FL-105 must be attached
fields.guidance_en: Must match or correct the children listed on the FL-100. If the Petitioner omitted a child or listed incorrect information, the Respondent should correct it here. The FL-105 (UCCJEA) is MANDATORY if children are involved.
fields.guidance_es: Debe coincidir o corregir los hijos listados en el FL-100. Si el Peticionario omitió un hijo o listó información incorrecta, el Demandado debe corregirlo aquí.
fields.guidance_zh: 必须与FL-100上列出的子女信息一致或进行更正。如请愿人遗漏子女或列出不正确信息，被告应在此更正。如涉及子女，FL-105（UCCJEA）为强制性附件。
common_errors: Not correcting Petitioner's errors about children
Omitting FL-105
Not listing all minor children from the relationship

options: Terminate ability to award support to Petitioner
Terminate ability to award support to Respondent
fields.guidance_en: Respondent states their own requests regarding spousal support. This may agree with or oppose the Petitioner's requests. CRITICAL: Terminating the right to support is PERMANENT and IRREVERSIBLE. If unsure, RESERVE jurisdiction.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado declara sus propias solicitudes respecto a la manutención conyugal. CRÍTICO: Terminar el derecho a manutención es PERMANENTE e IRREVERSIBLE. Si no está seguro, RESERVE jurisdicción.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告陈述其关于配偶赡养费的请求。可以同意或反对请愿人的请求。关键：终止赡养权是永久且不可逆的。如不确定，请保留管辖权。
common_errors: Accidentally waiving right to future support
Not requesting support when entitled
Checking conflicting options

fields.guidance_en: Respondent can request confirmation of their separate property. This is the Respondent's opportunity to identify assets and debts that should NOT be divided as community property.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado puede solicitar la confirmación de su propiedad separada.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告可以要求确认其个人财产。这是被告识别不应作为共同财产分割的资产和债务的机会。
common_errors: Not identifying separate property at this stage

fields.guidance_en: Respondent's request regarding community property division. California default is equal (50/50) division.
fields.guidance_es: Solicitud del Demandado respecto a la división de propiedad comunitaria. El valor predeterminado de California es división igualitaria (50/50).
fields.guidance_zh: 被告关于共同财产分割的请求。加利福尼亚默认为平均（50/50）分割。
common_errors: Not understanding all community assets must be disclosed
Agreeing to unequal division without legal basis

fields.guidance_en: Respondent can request attorney fees under FAM §2030, name restoration, or other relief. The Respondent CAN request relief even if the Petitioner did not — the Response is an independent pleading.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado puede solicitar honorarios de abogado bajo FAM §2030, restauración de nombre u otro alivio.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告可根据FAM §2030请求律师费、恢复姓名或其他救济。即使请愿人未请求，被告也可独立请求。
common_errors: Not requesting attorney fees when income disparity exists
Not understanding Response is an independent pleading

fields.guidance_en: Respondent's custody requests. May agree with or oppose the Petitioner. Attach FL-311 for detailed custody/visitation plan. The court will apply the 'best interest of the child' standard (FAM §3011).
fields.guidance_es: Solicitudes de custodia del Demandado. Puede estar de acuerdo o en oposición al Peticionario. Adjunte FL-311 para un plan detallado.
fields.guidance_zh: 被告的监护权请求。可以同意或反对请愿人。附上FL-311以提供详细的监护/探视计划。法院将适用'子女最佳利益'标准（FAM §3011）。
common_errors: Not attaching FL-311 when detailed orders needed
Not addressing custody when children are involved
Confusing legal and physical custody

fields.guidance_en: Respondent can request child support. California uses a mandatory guideline formula (FAM §4055). Both parties' incomes and timeshare percentage are used in the calculation.
fields.guidance_es: El Demandado puede solicitar manutención de menores. California usa una fórmula guía obligatoria (FAM §4055).
fields.guidance_zh: 被告可以请求子女抚养费。加利福尼亚使用强制性指导公式（FAM §4055）。双方收入和时间分配百分比用于计算。
common_errors: Not requesting support when entitled
Not understanding guideline formula

fields.guidance_en: Sign and date under penalty of perjury. Your signature certifies all information is true and correct. Must include city and state where signed.
fields.guidance_es: Firme y feche bajo pena de perjurio. Su firma certifica que toda la información es verdadera y correcta.
fields.guidance_zh: 在伪证处罚条款下签名并注明日期。您的签名证明所有信息真实正确。必须包括签署地的城市和州。
common_errors: Forgetting to sign
Wrong date
Missing city/state

fields.guidance_en: The Response MUST be filed within 30 calendar days of personal service of the Summons and Petition. If served by notice and acknowledgment of receipt, 30 days from the date of signing the acknowledgment. Failure to file a timely response may result in a DEFAULT judgment — the court may grant everything the Petitioner requested without your input.
fields.guidance_es: La Respuesta DEBE presentarse dentro de 30 días calendario de la notificación personal de la Citación y Petición. No presentar una respuesta oportuna puede resultar en un fallo en REBELDÍA.
fields.guidance_zh: 答辩书必须在亲自送达传票和请愿书后30个日历日内提交。未能及时提交答辩书可能导致缺席判决——法院可能在无您参与的情况下批准请愿人的所有请求。
common_errors: Missing the 30-day deadline
Not understanding default consequences
Confusing service date with filing date
Not filing fee waiver to preserve deadline
